progress_reward.issue: Coefficient 10.0 is too low; mean progress reward is only 0.16, insufficient to drive learning toward target score 200.

stability_penalty.issue: Mean penalty -0.34 dominates total reward, causing agent to be overly cautious and not make progress.

soft_landing_bonus.issue: Very low nonzero rate (0.6%) and small magnitude; barely influences behavior.

reasoning: Current score -108.58 is far below target 200. Progress reward coefficient (10.0) is too weak; stability penalty dominates. Best_reward.py is identical to previous, so no revert needed. Increase progress coefficient to at least 50, reduce stability penalty weights, and consider adding a distance anchor to prevent oscillation.
new_lessons: progress_reward coefficient must be >= 50 to drive learning
stability_penalty weights should be reduced to avoid dominance
